name: Bethel Courts
description: There are no nets at the courts.  We were visiting for 5 days in the area and tried to contact the Rotary Club about getting nets. They were listed in signage as managing the courts. We found only an email for contact.  Never heard anything back other than a message that asked if we'd heard anything back. You might try bethelrec@gmail.com, which is listed below.

name: Fryeburg Recreational Fields
description: One net available to play during non-scheduled times.
fees: Fee required — $3 for outside guests during scheduled play.

name: Norway Rec
description: Norway Rec is a place to play pickleball in Norway, ME. There are 2 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free.
